metadata.description: Short base name; lowercase letters/numbers, 3-12 chars.
Azure region. Defaults to the resource group location.
Container image for the MCP server. Defaults to a placeholder.
Container image for the per-profile MCP container apps (mcp-server:0.2.0+). Falls back to mcpImage if empty.
Container image for the chat-api FastAPI service (chat-api:0.3.1+ uses Microsoft Agent Framework FoundryChatClient with hosted MCP tools and an explicit HITL approval flow).
Container image for the chat-ui SPA (chat-ui:0.1.0+). Empty disables the deployment.
Bypass Easy Auth on the chat-api Container App and accept ?as_user=. Set to "false" once Easy Auth is configured.
Entra tenant ID for end-user JWT validation + OBO+FIC.
Entra app ID for the backend (mpwflow-api). Used as JWT audience and OBO client_id.
Entra app ID for the SPA (mpwflow-spa). Plumbed into the chat-ui build via Vite env vars.
Azure region for the Foundry account. Defaults to the resource group location. Override if the chosen model is not available in the main region.
Chat model deployment name used by the Foundry agents.
Chat model SKU (GlobalStandard is the cheapest pay-as-you-go SKU).
Chat model capacity in thousands of TPM. 30 = 30K TPM.
Secondary chat model deployment name (gpt-5.3 family). Empty disables.
Secondary chat model capacity in thousands of TPM.
Name of the user-assigned managed identity.
Cosmos DB account name (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens; 3-44 chars).
Azure region for the account write region.
Principal (object) ID of the managed identity that should get data-plane Contributor access.
Throughput mode. autoscale uses an autoscale max RU; serverless ignores RU.
Autoscale max RU (only used when throughputMode = autoscale). Per-database shared throughput.
ACR name (lowercase alphanumeric, 5-50 chars, globally unique).
Principal (object) ID granted AcrPull on this registry.
Image reference (e.g. <acr>.azurecr.io/mcp-server:0.1.0). Placeholder allowed for first deploy.
ACR login server (e.g. <acr>.azurecr.io). Used for the registry block when image points to ACR.
User-assigned managed identity client ID (used by Azure SDK DefaultAzureCredential).
Profile that gates which MCP tools this app exposes. Empty string keeps the legacy single-app behavior (no AGENT_PROFILE env var injected — not recommended).

containers.name: mcp-server
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('userAssignedIdentityClientId')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('cosmosEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_DATABASE', 'value', parameters('cosmosDatabase')), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')), createObject('name', 'PORT', 'value', '8080')), if(empty(parameters('agentProfile')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'AGENT_PROFILE', 'value', parameters('agentProfile')))))]

metadata.description: Name of the user-assigned managed identity.
Cosmos DB account name (must already exist in the same RG).
Principal (object) ID granted Cosmos Built-in Data Contributor.
Stable name suffix to scope the role assignment GUID (e.g. the UAMI name).
ACR resource name (must already exist in the same RG).
Stable name suffix to scope the role assignment GUID (e.g. the UAMI name).
Image reference (e.g. <acr>.azurecr.io/mcp-server:0.1.0). Placeholder allowed for first deploy.
ACR login server (e.g. <acr>.azurecr.io). Used for the registry block when image points to ACR.
User-assigned managed identity client ID (used by Azure SDK DefaultAzureCredential).
Profile that gates which MCP tools this app exposes. Empty string keeps the legacy single-app behavior (no AGENT_PROFILE env var injected — not recommended).

containers.name: mcp-server
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('userAssignedIdentityClientId')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('cosmosEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'COSMOS_DATABASE', 'value', parameters('cosmosDatabase')), createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')), createObject('name', 'PORT', 'value', '8080')), if(empty(parameters('agentProfile')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'AGENT_PROFILE', 'value', parameters('agentProfile')))))]

metadata.description: Name of the user-assigned managed identity.
ACR resource name (must already exist in the same RG).
Stable name suffix to scope the role assignment GUID (e.g. the UAMI name).
Foundry (Cognitive Services / AIServices) account name in the same RG.
Stable label used to scope the role-assignment GUIDs (typically the UAMI name).
Model deployment name used by the Foundry agents.
Submissions MCP backend URL (must include /mcp suffix).
Tax SME MCP backend URL (must include /mcp suffix).
Legal SME MCP backend URL (must include /mcp suffix).
Bypass Easy Auth header check and accept ?as_user=. Set false in production.
Entra tenant ID. Empty disables JWT validation (dev only).
Entra app ID for the backend (mpwflow-api). Used as JWT audience.
Required scope on the bearer token. Defaults to Chat.ReadWrite.
Client ID of the user-assigned managed identity that holds the federated identity credential (FIC) for the OBO exchange.
Registered Foundry PromptAgent name for the submissions participant (chat-api 0.3.0 connects via FoundryAgent).
Registered Foundry PromptAgent version for the submissions participant.
Registered Foundry PromptAgent name for the tax participant.
Registered Foundry PromptAgent version for the tax participant.
Registered Foundry PromptAgent name for the legal participant.
Registered Foundry PromptAgent version for the legal participant.
Name of the user-assigned managed identity.
ACR resource name (must already exist in the same RG).
Stable name suffix to scope the role assignment GUID (e.g. the UAMI name).
Backend base URL used by nginx reverse proxy for /api/*.
Foundry (Cognitive Services / AIServices) account name. Globally unique-ish; lowercased.
Foundry project name (resource and friendly name).
Azure region for the Foundry account and project.
Principal (object) ID of the user-assigned MI that will create and run agents.
Chat model deployment name (used by the agents).
Model deployment SKU. GlobalStandard is the cheapest pay-as-you-go SKU for gpt-4o-mini.
Model deployment capacity in thousands of TPM. 30 = 30K TPM.
Secondary chat model deployment name (e.g. gpt-5.3 family). Set empty string to skip.
Secondary model deployment capacity in thousands of TPM.

properties.description: Foundry project for the multi-person workflow agents.
